**Checklist ✅**

- [ ] Branched off `main` with a `type/short-slug` name
- [ ] New skill directories symlinked via `./bootstrap.sh`
- [ ] Each `SKILL.md` has `name` + `description` frontmatter, and the description enumerates concrete trigger phrases
- [ ] Smoke-tested the affected skill(s) in Claude Code
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits with `Signed-off-by` + `Co-Authored-By` trailers
- [ ] Docs and inter-skill cross-references updated where relevant
